Guideline: Neutral professional tone, matching en-US but with British English conventions.
Same professional, instructional tone as en-US.
Gender-neutral: workers instead of employees in most contexts, matching en-US.
British spelling: Behaviour (not Behavior), Colour (not Color), organisational (not organizational), labelling (not labeling), Centre (not Center). This is the primary difference from en-US.
Behaviour (not Behavior); Colour (not Color); organisational (not organizational); Cost Centre (not Cost Center); labelling (not labeling). All other terminology matches en-US.
